'''''Star Wars: Dark Times: Parallels''''' is the second story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]'' comic series.

{{Comics-stub}}

==Plot summary==
At the dawn of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], two beings a galaxy apart will do the unthinkable to save those in their care, only to risk losing themselves in the process.

After [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] forces [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[K'Kruhk]] to take desperate measures in defense of some [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|younglings]], he believes he has found for them a peaceful oasis in an oppressed galaxy. But little does K'Kruhk know, a far away drama involving [[Bomo Greenbark]] and the smuggling crew of the [[Uhumele]] will alter his future forever. Meanwhile, these dark times have taken much from Bomo Greenbark, but he cannot—will not—let it take his new-found friends. No matter what it takes, Bomo will fight to his last breath.{{Plot}}

"Parallels"

A disastrous ending to a rescue mission has shattered the friendship between Jedi Master Dass Jennir and Bomo Greenbark, and forced the smuggler crew of the Uhumele to choose sides against one of the pair. In this dangerous period just after the formation of the Empire, the Jedi are marked as outlaws and forced to take on new roles in order to survive - and Dass Jennir is by no means the only Jedi to realize this...
